entries.content: Friday evening — got home from work at 7:42 PM Philippines time. Decided to cook beef caldereta for dinner. Marinated beef in soy sauce, fried it, then boiled with tomato sauce, liver spread, and vegetables. Shared the full recipe with Gentech via voice message. God bless to all.

Sunday — special day for Filipinos. Most have the day off so family and friends are complete. Drinking, fun, stories. I cooked chicken tinola for my family — garlic, onion, crushed pepper, ginger, green chili, chili leaves, and sayote. Simple but delicious. Perfect for rainy weather. Happy to share my daily life with you all.
Rainy evening in the Philippines — stayed inside with family (mom, siblings, niece, daughters). Made fried eggplant with bagoong alamang for dinner. Happy to share simple moments together.

Good morning from Philippines! Sunday — favorite day because daughters and I are together. Cooked pork sinigang for lunch — everyone's favorite. Neighbors drinking, many people outside. Church is the tradition. Filipinos love to dance until night. Happy to be part of this life.
